title: The Last Pharaoh's Secret
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: Cleopatra's handmaiden records the true story of the queen's final days in a scroll hidden in a tomb that is discovered 2000 years later.
long_description:
In 30 BCE, as Alexandria burns and Octavian's legions close in, Cleopatra's most trusted handmaiden Iris receives a final command from her queen: write the truth. Not the version Octavian will force upon the world, but the real story of love, politics, poison, and a secret alliance that could have toppled Rome. Iris hides her scroll in a sealed chamber within Cleopatra's unfinished tomb and walks into the desert, disappearing from history.

Two thousand years later, disgraced archaeologist Dr. Julian Marchetti uncovers the scroll during an illegal excavation west of Alexandria. As he translates Iris's precise, devastating account, he realizes that everything history believes about Egypt's last pharaoh is wrong. The asp was a cover story. The tragic seductress was a strategic ruler. And Cleopatra's legacy did not end with her death.

Spanning two millennia, The Last Pharaoh's Secret is a novel about the power of the written word, the fragility of historical truth, and the women who refuse to be erased. Through Iris's eyes, we witness Cleopatra as she truly was: brilliant, calculating, fierce, and desperate to protect her kingdom and her children. Through Julian's journey, we see how the past reaches across time to demand justice.
main_characters: Iris — Cleopatra's Greek handmaiden and scribe, keeper of the true story
Cleopatra VII — The last Ptolemaic pharaoh of Egypt
Dr. Julian Marchetti — A disgraced Italian archaeologist who discovers the scroll
Nadine — Julian's Egyptian assistant, pragmatic and cautious
Dr. Amara Singh — Julian's ex-wife, a Ptolemaic history specialist in London
Mark Antony — Roman general, Cleopatra's lover, defeated at Actium
Caesarion — Cleopatra's son with Julius Caesar
Octavian (Augustus) — Antony's rival, future emperor of Rome
Charmion — Cleopatra's other handmaiden, loyal to the end
